name: get_highlighted_objects
full_help:
get_highlighted_objects

Description: 
Get highlighted objects

Syntax: 
get_highlighted_objects  [-color_index <arg>] [-rgb <args>] [-color <arg>]
                         [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
list of highlighted objects

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-color_index]  Color index
  [-rgb]          RGB color index list
  [-color]        Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and 
                  orange
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Object, GUIControl

arguments.description: Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and orange
Suspend message limits during command execution
